packageRules.description: Allow critical security fixes immediately regardless of age
Keep <MauiVersion> in lockstep with Microsoft.Maui.Controls in the same PR

customManagers.description: Track <MauiVersion> MSBuild property in csproj files (mirrors Microsoft.Maui.Controls). Without this, Renovate's nuget manager only bumps the explicit PackageReference entries and leaves the MauiVersion property stale -- the resulting workload/controls skew crashed prod with a MissingMethodException on AccessibilityNodeInfoCompat.set_Checked after MAUI 10.0.50 -> 10.0.70.
